message:
fix(postgres): make build_parse_msg fallible and guard against parameter overflow

Change build_parse_msg and build_bind_msg to reject more than i16::MAX
parameters with a PgError::Protocol error, preventing silent truncation
or wire-protocol violations when queries exceed PostgreSQL's 32767
parameter limit. All call sites (query_params, execute_params, prepare)
updated to propagate the new Result. Doc examples corrected for renamed
methods (query_params, get_typed) and BYTEA OID comment. Minor style
refactor in sync pool waiter cleanup path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
